results.title: Green Finance for Costa Rica Tourism: BCR Launches Climate Adaptability Funds for SMEs
results.description: The post Green Finance for Costa Rica Tourism: BCR Launches Climate Adaptability Funds for SMEs appeared first on The Costa Rica News . Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) operating within Costa Rica’s vital tourism sector have secured a major boost for future operations. Through a newly launched financial program titled BCR Pyme Acción Turismo, local businesses can now access dedicated lines of financing designed specifically to strengthen business continuity and foster climate change adaptability. Announced officially by the [...] The post Green Finance for Costa Rica Tourism: BCR Launches Climate Adaptability Funds for SMEs appeared first on The Costa Rica News .

results.title: Iran's supreme leader warns of 'unforgettable lessons' if US continues attacks
results.description: Iran's supreme leader issued stern warnings after the United States conducted further strikes. Tehran announced it is suspending commitments to a recently signed interim deal. Kuwait reported significant damage to its water and oil facilities from Iranian attacks. US airstrikes targeted infrastructure in Iran's southern Hormozgan province. Both nations continue to vie for control of the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway.
